game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ダンジョントレーサー (Dungeon Tracer)** Players navigate a grid-based dungeon by swiping to connect 3 or more adjacent, identical tiles (e.g., red attack, blue defense, green healing, yellow mana) to activate their effects, consuming the connected tiles and causing new ones to cascade down. Connecting attack tiles deals damage to visible enemies based on the number of tiles and player's attack stat (e.g., 5 damage per tile), while defense tiles reduce incoming damage for the next turn by a percentage (e.g., 10% per tile), and healing tiles restore a fixed amount of HP (e.g., 5 HP per tile). Defeating enemies grants experience points to level up the player character, increasing base stats like HP and attack by 5% per level, and also drops gold and items; gold is spent in a shop UI to purchase new equipment (e.g., swords, armor) or upgrade existing items up to 5 tiers, each increasing specific stats by 10-20%. The dungeon layout and enemy encounters are procedurally generated, with difficulty scaling by increasing enemy HP by 15% and attack by 10% every 5 floors, introducing new enemy types with unique abilities (e.g., poison, stun) and boss encounters every 10 floors. Players aim to survive as long as possible, with the game ending when their character's HP reaches 0, and progression is tracked via a global leaderboard based on floors cleared and total score accumulated.
game_info.description: Navigate a procedurally generated dungeon by matching 3 or more adjacent tiles of the same color to activate powerful effects. Red tiles deal damage to enemies, blue tiles provide defense, green tiles heal you, and yellow tiles restore mana. Defeat enemies to gain experience, level up, and collect gold to purchase equipment upgrades. Survive as long as possible through increasingly difficult floors with stronger enemies and epic boss battles every 10 floors!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate and select tiles on the grid
Space: Confirm tile selection and activate matched tiles
Shift: Cancel current selection
Z: Open/close shop (when available between floors)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart and return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic tile matching mechanics and movement controls. Validates that the player can select adjacent tiles, form valid matches of 3+ tiles, and that the game correctly processes tile effects (damage, healing, defense, mana).
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically scans the grid for matching tiles of any color. Prioritizes forming larger matches (4+ tiles) for better effects. Alternates between attack tiles to damage enemies and healing tiles to maintain HP.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully matches tiles, deals damage to enemies, and maintains positive HP. The test validates tile selection, matching logic, cascading mechanics, and basic combat functionality work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal winning strategy to progress through multiple dungeon floors. Validates combat effectiveness, resource management, shop purchasing, and ability to defeat bosses.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritizes red attack tiles when enemies are present to maximize damage output. Uses green healing tiles strategically when HP is below 50%. Collects gold and purchases weapon upgrades at the shop. Focuses on efficient enemy elimination to progress floors quickly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player clears multiple floors (target: 10+ floors), defeats at least one boss encounter, successfully uses shop to upgrade equipment, and demonstrates progression in stats and power. Test succeeds when reaching floor 10 or higher.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests defensive gameplay and survival mechanics. Validates that defense tiles properly reduce incoming damage and that the player can survive extended encounters.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Balances between attack (red) and defense (blue) tiles. Uses blue tiles before enemy attacks to stack damage reduction. Maintains HP above 75% through healing. Tests the sustainability of defensive play style.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player survives for extended duration with controlled HP management. Defense buffs are properly applied and reduce damage. Test validates that defense mechanics work as intended and enable survival strategies.
